content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-international-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Singapore is one of the most romantic places to travel for a honeymoon. It is a safe country with plenty of unique tourist attractions and activities to match everyone’s interests. With over a dozen Singapore honeymoon packages from ATW Travels, you will be spoilt for choice. You even have the freedom to customize your romantic Singapore honeymoon tour package to include activities and locations you’d like to explore.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Visit Singapore?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Singapore’s tropical climate makes it a year-long destination for honeymooners. With the Chinese New Year festival in January, the grand shopping festival in June-August, and the mid-autumn festival in October, Singapore is buzzing with travel enthusiasts. Irrespective of the season, we promise a memorable vacation experience on a budget you can afford. For instance, Sentosa Island is home to some of the best tropical beaches, luxurious hotels, and the most thrilling attractions. You’ll find the world’s most immense oceanarium with over 100,000 marine creatures in Sentosa. Irrespective of the season you choose, our Singapore honeymoon packages for couples will always include whatever the island offers best in those months.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26311″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What are the Best Places to Visit in Singapore?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Known worldwide for its artificial architectural wonders and billion-dollar gardens, Singapore offers plenty of experiences that newlyweds can cherish forever. From romantic beaches and boat rides to exciting joyrides in theme parks, Singapore offers a diverse range of activities for newly married couples to enjoy. There are plenty of options to keep everyone enthralled, including a trip to Universal Studios, Gardens By The Bay, Singapore Zoo, and Sentosa. You could indulge in a cable car ride, surf at Wave House, or riding on a Singapore cable car or the surf at the Wave house and enjoying a boat ride at The River Safari. Book Singapore honeymoon packages with us to have a gala time throughout the trip. Some of the best attractions in Singapore include:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Marina Bay” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Located in the heart of Singapore, Marina Bay is known for its buildings, hotels, and other architectural structures. Some of the prominent attractions in Marina Bay include Gardens By The Bay, The Merlion Of Singapore, and the Marina Bay Sands Hotel. The 3.5 km waterfront promenade around Marina Bay boasts of the famous Merlion statue. The evenings bring Marina Bay to life when the beautifully lit-up skyline is reflected off the water, making it look spectacular. The light show is choreographed to foot-tapping soundtracks and is a crowd magnet.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26314″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Gardens by the Bay” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

A premier attraction for international tourists, Gardens by the Bay represents the plant kingdom in an entirely new light with its fantastic garden artistry. The gardens encompass plants from different parts of the globe – no wonder visitors find the trip to this place educating and entertaining. Couples can walk hand in hand through a Flower dome that holds a variety of flowers from different countries and later pass through the romantic Cloud Forest inside, where the dip in temperatures makes one feel as if you are walking through the clouds.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Sentosa Island” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Some of the best Singapore packages for couples include spending a day or two at Sentosa. You can spend some time on the beach amidst the sun and sand or hold hands while enjoying the sunset on The Royal Albatross, Singapore’s only luxury tall ship. A romantic date on Southern Island Yacht is an experience only equalled by the snorkelling adventure at the Adventure Cove Waterpark.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Jurong Bird Park” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

This park is every bird lover’s paradise thanks to the artificially created bird habitats that hold birds from various continents in their natural conditions. It is home to over 4,000 birds with exciting places like Flamingo Lake, Penguin coast, Parrot Paradise, and fun activities like the High Flyers Show at the pool’s amphitheatre. Our Singapore honeymoon package price includes bird shows where you can watch Macaws play basketball and Amigo sing songs.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219711622{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Stay Connected

[/vc_column_text][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-phone” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786099141{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

+91 9693339999

[/vc_column_text][vc_separator el_width=”30″][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-envelope” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786244533{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

info@atwtravels.com

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1653552904524{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Dream Vacay Today!

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Henderson Bridge” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

The Henderson Waves Bridge is the highest pedestrian bridge in Singapore and is famous for its undulating shape. Made of steel arches filled with slats of Balau wood that look like curved ribs, the shape of the bridge with its hidden recesses and shell-like niches allows pedestrians to sit and observe their surroundings. Tourists can walk on the bridge as it curves and twists along its length of 274-metres to appreciate a stunning view of the island. The Henderson Bridge offers privacy and room to rest and is a popular place on weekends for couples.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26315″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What is the Famous Food of Singapore?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Singaporean cuisine is a unique fusion of elements from different ethnic groups, the Chinese, Indian, and Malay. In fact, some of Singapore’s famous delicacies are influenced by Malaysian, Chinese, Indonesian, Korean, Japanese, and Indian cuisines. Some of the things you must sample here include roti prata, Hainanese chicken rice, Chilli crab, nasi padang, satay, fish head curry, and laksa. After a hearty meal, couples can indulge in delicious local desserts like Bubur cha-cha or go for the famous ice cream sandwiches sold on the streets. Our Singapore trip package for couples includes trips to Chinatown, Little India, and Albert Food Centre.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How to Travel Within Singapore?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Singapore is known for its efficient public transport, the Mass Rapid Transit or MRT. In fact, the MRT is the fastest way to travel within Singapore. It also operates buses that take you just about everywhere within Singapore. Other modes of transportation include taxis, trishaws, and EZ links. However, our Singapore honeymoon package cost covers all travel requirements to ensure your trip is hassle-free.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26313″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Is a Singapore Honeymoon Package with Flight Charges Affordable?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Singapore is one of the most expensive cities in Asia, but it can be affordable for tourists, provided you choose the right travel partner. At ATW Travels, weoffer a wide range of Singapore tour options. Our Singapore honeymoon package with flight charges includes budget-friendly itineraries. Right from your travel requirements to stay, sightseeing and food, we cover everything.

Get in touch with us at ATW Travels to avail yourself of the best Singapore honeymoon tour packages.

Follow us on Instagram and learn about our latest and the best deals or reach out to us at 9693339999 to chart out your travel plans.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_empty_space height=”20px” css=”.vc_custom_1646651109946{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”show-mobile contact_bg modifiedcontact”][vc_column][vc_column_text]Get the Guaranteed Best Vacation Deals from ATW Travels[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” equal_height=”yes” css=”.vc_custom_1645101771770{margin-top: 10px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”homebooking”][vc_column width=”1/2″ el_class=”whitecontent”][vc_empty_space height=”100px” el_class=”removeheight” css=”.vc_custom_1653552919997{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1643784959089{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]
